name: Crispy Cheese Ball Bites
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup ground or finely chopped nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Let the cheese stand at room temperature before mixing.
2. Beat or process the cheese, milk, Worcestershire sauce, and lemon juice until well-blended.
3. Stir in pimiento and chives.
4. Form into 40 small balls.
5. Roll each ball in nuts and cover; chill.
6. Open refrigerated twists and unroll.
7. Cut dough horizontally to make 4 sections, then cut each section into 5 pieces (each made up of 4 short strips).
8. On a lightly floured surface, use fingers to press and pull each strip until it is about 2 inches wide and 5 inches long.
9. Cut in half.
10. Place cheese in the center of one piece; cover with the other piece. Pull and pinch edges to seal.
11. Repeat with remaining pieces. This will make 20 squares from each package.
12. Cover and chill until ready to fry.
13. Deep fry 2 wrapped cheese balls at a time for 2 to 3 minutes, turning to brown all sides.
14. Makes 40.
